title: Creative Co-Op Black & White Stoneware Measuring Cups with Gold Electroplating (Set of 4 Sizes)
description:
About this item
Gold electroplating around rim
Stoneware construction
Set includes 4 pieces
Cup Sizes: 1, 1/2, 1/3 & 1/4 Cup
Hand wash only
reviews_5s:
Very nice, much better than I thought, really pleased.
Practical and prettyI also have a matching mug. Makes me happy just to look at them.Use it for baking useful and beautifulThese are the cutest measuring cups. I bought them as a gift but I will be purchasing some for myself. Some reviews said they don’t measure accurately but I’m not sure of that. They came in perfect condition and the quality is worth the price.Super cute I’m my kitchen with my new pots and they match my new fishers that I absolutely love!Great measuring cups!I love how cute they are and that you can just leave them on the counter of your kitchen. They are very nice quality and would be such a cute gift!These are the CUTEST measuring cups! They match my dishes perfectly! I was very happy with them. But the 1/2 cup bowl was broken. I feel like the company will send a new set. I sure hope so- I love these! The drawback is I have to send the other bowls back. I just wanted the broken one replaced. But I do love these! Worth waiting for! Update! The company shipped a replacement set very quickly! Still love them.Exactly as described! This set is perfect for our black & white kitchen. The gold accents on the rim are a stunning touch! Love the designs on each cup & the spouts make it simple to pour ingredients from. Would definitely recommend!!Super cute measuring cups. So glad i bought them. Love the designs. Easy to read.
reviews_1s:
I ordered this item twice...both orders came damaged. I then read the reviews and realized that is is common with this item. They are very nice, look great but receiving one that is not damaged has been a real hassle to say the least. I am reluctant to order a third time....Not worth the cost and hassle to return.This product is fragile. Arrived damaged and broken.Play Video
As demonstrated in the video, the measurements are wrong. Very disappointed in the product.Received 2 sets so far....both smashed into a million peices.
